programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that 2.3m swell and cross-shore wind, today's Ribeira session will offer more paddling practice than actual riding.

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
